title: Unshaken Reign

sections.label: Intro
lines: A throne of fire ignites the sky,
Mountains melt as the King draws nigh,
Justice whispers, mercy sings,
The earth bows low to the Lord of kings.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Clouds conceal the radiant face,
Wrapped in glory, veiled in grace.
Thunder echoes, heavens proclaim,
The righteous Judge, unshaken Name.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Let the sea roar, let the earth rejoice,
Every heart lift a grateful voice.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: The Lord reigns, let the people sing!
Flames of joy to the heavens ring.
Darkness flees at His brilliant light,
The Lord of all is our delight.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Idols fall, their power fades,
All are drawn to the light He made.
Mountains crumble, rivers praise,
Creation lifts a song of grace.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: The skies alight with justice pure,
In His hand, the world secure.
Mercy flows where truth has shone,
Glory belongs to Him alone.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: The Lord reigns, let the people sing!
Flames of joy to the heavens ring.
Darkness flees at His brilliant light,
The Lord of all is our delight.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Clouds part wide, His kingdom calls,
Every soul before Him falls.

styleNote: Soaring Vocals With Powerful · Dynamic Chords
